title: ContinuumEstimateRecord
description: Richardson extrapolation result for a single quantity across a refinement ladder (M47). Provides a continuum limit estimate Q_0 and convergence order p via Q(h) = Q_0 + C * h^p.

quantityId.description: Identifier of the quantity being extrapolated

errorBand.description: Estimated error band (absolute). Derived from fit residual or classical formula error estimate.

convergenceOrder.description: Estimated convergence order p from Q(h) = Q_0 + C * h^p fit

confidenceNote.description: Diagnostic note about the quality or reliability of this estimate

runRecords.description: Individual run records for each refinement level that contributed to this estimate

meshParameter.description: Mesh parameter h for this level

computedValue.description: Quantity value computed at this refinement level

failed.description: True if the solver failed at this refinement level

failureReason.description: Reason for failure (null if not failed)
